overview: A production-ready Event Finder web application with dark glassmorphism design, real-time search and filtering across 20+ events, secure ticket checkout, full auth flow with JWT display, and beautiful animated UI sections including trending events, featured organizers, and personalized recommendations.
features: Real-time search and category filtering across 20+ events
Dark glassmorphism UI with animated gradient hero
Event detail modal with schedule, speakers, and actions
Security features: auth modal, cookie consent, secure checkout, input sanitization
Trending section, featured organizers, stats bar, newsletter
Responsive design: mobile hamburger menu to desktop 3-column grid
